question: Is the princess on the left rendered in a Disney 3D animation style (e.g., smooth shading, soft global illumination, stylized proportions)?
Is the panda in the center rendered in a traditional Chinese ink wash painting style (e.g., monochrome ink look, watercolor bleed, visible brushstrokes)?
Is the detective on the right rendered in a black and white American comic book line art style (e.g., bold outlines, hatching/cross-hatching, lack of color fill)?
Does the magnifying glass held by the detective exhibit a LEGO brick style (e.g., plastic texture, studs, blocky geometry)?
Is the background depicted as a cyberpunk neon-lit futuristic city street (e.g., neon signage, high-contrast night lighting)?
Is the ground surface clearly rendered with a Persian carpet texture (e.g., ornate repeating motifs, woven textile appearance)?
Are the three characters (princess, panda, detective) visually distinct in their respective styles, rather than blending into a single unified style?
Is the LEGO brick style of the magnifying glass visually distinct from the black and white comic book style of the detective holding it?
Is there a clear stylistic separation between the multi-style foreground characters and the cyberpunk city background?
Are the characters positioned correctly according to the prompt (Princess on the left, Panda in the center, Detective on the right)?
